description: Kaleyra provides communications-platform services for businesses, including SMS, WhatsApp, voice, email, video, verification, and related messaging tools. Its public developer documentation is hosted on developers.kaleyra.io, with separate voice API docs on apidocs-voice.kaleyra.com.
summary: Kaleyra exposes documented HTTP APIs for its CPaaS platform plus a separate Voice API; both require a Kaleyra-issued API key. No public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
